overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a sunlit medieval fantasy coastal town. The character moves from a rocky waterfront path through narrow cobblestone streets, a covered market area, and into an open plaza with distinctive Mediterranean-style stone architecture and red-tiled roofs.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky waterfront path approaching medieval town

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky waterfront path toward the town entrance

notable_agents.action: woman standing by the water's edge looking out over the canal

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff with sparse vegetation forming the left boundary of the path
distinctive red building with round window and terracotta roof tiles
tall cylindrical stone tower with orange conical roof
rough wooden posts and rails along the water's edge
calm blue-green water of the canal or harbor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit rocky waterfront path with the camera following Geralt as he approaches a medieval town. To the left is a steep rocky cliff face, while to the right a wooden fence separates the path from the canal water. In the distance, a distinctive red building and stone watchtower mark the town entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: town entrance with stone stairs and narrow passage

events.description: transitions from open waterfront path into the built-up town area with stone architecture

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs into the town center, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in brown vest and hat walking down the stairs in the opposite direction
woman in grey dress walking up the stairs alongside the player

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up into the town center
building with weathered blue plaster walls and wooden door
overhanging wooden balconies on the stone buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into the town as Geralt ascends stone stairs into a narrow enclosed area. The ground changes from dirt to cobblestone. NPCs move in opposing directions on the stairs, and the architecture shifts to stone buildings with wooden balconies. The red building from before is now closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow winding street between tall stone buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow winding street, passing by townspeople going about their business

notable_agents.action: woman in headscarf and dress walking alongside the player character

entered.detail: stone archway bridge connecting buildings in the distance
wooden cart with wheels parked against the wall
large terracotta pots with olive trees flanking doorways

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through a narrow cobblestone street flanked by tall stone buildings that block most of the sky. The street winds gently with potted olive trees and a wooden cart visible. A stone archway bridge is visible in the distance, and NPCs walk alongside and ahead of the player.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with fabric canopy overhead

events.description: enters covered market area with overhead fabric canopy and merchant stalls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the market street passing wooden stalls and browsing merchants

notable_agents.action: merchant in straw hat and blue shirt tending to a wooden stall
merchant in pink shirt arranging goods on display

entered.detail: fabric canopy stretched overhead providing shade to the market street
crude wooden stalls displaying goods and produce
green fabric awning extending from building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered market street with a fabric canopy overhead. Wooden market stalls line both sides of the cobblestone path, with merchants in straw hats tending to their goods. The lighting becomes mixed as sunlight filters through the canopy, creating dappled shadows on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town plaza with stone archways and outdoor seating

events.description: exits covered market into sunlit open plaza with wider cobblestone area and archway

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward a stone archway, passing seated townspeople

notable_agents.action: elderly man with white hair seated against the wall resting

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the exit of the plaza
ornate red building facade with columns and green awning
wooden benches and tables outside a building

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered market, the scene opens into a sunlit cobblestone plaza. A large stone archway stands in the center distance, while a red building with ornate facade dominates the left side. The area is less crowded, with an elderly man seated against the wall and outdoor seating visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rugged coastal path into the heart of a sunlit medieval town. It begins on a rocky waterfront trail flanked by a steep cliff and a wooden fence, moving toward a distant red building and stone watchtower. As the camera ascends stone stairs, the dirt path transforms into cobblestone and the environment closes in with stone buildings and wooden balconies. The scene then winds through a narrow street of tall facades and potted olive trees before shifting into a semi-covered market where sunlight filters through fabric canopies and wooden stalls. Finally, the camera exits the market and opens into a wide, sunlit cobblestone plaza featuring a large stone archway and an ornate red building.
